name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentations that actually look like a human made them.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, templated slides that require heavy manual cleanup to look professional. Chronicle 2.0 aims to close the gap between AI-generated speed and human-quality design, so teams spend less time reformatting and more time communicating. It targets professionals who need polished decks fast without sacrificing visual credibility.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with clean, on-brand design
Creating client-facing project updates and reports
Producing internal strategy presentations without a designer
Turning written briefs or documents into structured slide decks
